ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number worn by the player */,
  "class_year" TEXT /* Class year of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "rsci_top_100" TEXT /* Ranking in RSCI Top 100 (if applicable) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of player's performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player profile was last updated */,
  "profile_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the player profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win/loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical attribute entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the attributes were recorded */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "bench_press" INTEGER /* Bench press (in pounds) */,
  "squat" INTEGER /* Squat (in pounds) */,
  "vertical_leap" INTEGER /* Vertical leap (in inches) */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_attributes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated recovery time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for the academic record */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA for the semester */,
  "credits_attempted" INTEGER /* Credits attempted during the semester */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Credits earned during the semester */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team assignment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the team assignment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player on the team */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Whether the player is a team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_assignments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_assignments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport played by the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport coached by the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coached by the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training schedule */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity during the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of media file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_media_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_documents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player update */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_updates_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
